mapper.sql: id, scenic_name, abbreviation,address, scenic_phone, contact_people, contact_phone, business_license, legal_person, legal_idcard, create_time, is_delete, audit_state, user_id ,grade,lat,lng,max_bearing,warning_value,now_people,legal_photo,warning_time
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM report_base_scenic where scenic_name like concat('%',#{keyword},'%')

select rb.id as baseId, ${tableName}_name as baseName, address, ${tableName}_phone phone , contact_people contactPeople, contact_phone contactPhone, business_license businessLicense, legal_person legalPerson, legal_idcard legalIdcard, rb.create_time createTime, audit_state auditState, user_id userId,ui.is_enable as isloginAccountEnable,ui.user_name as loginName, ull.login_number as loginCount,grade,lat,lng,max_bearing maxBearing, warning_value warningValue,now_people nowPeople from report_base_${tableName} rb LEFT JOIN security_login.user_info ui ON rb.user_id = ui.id LEFT JOIN security_login.user_login_log ull ON ui.user_name= ull.user_name where rb.is_delete = 0
and (${tableName}_name like concat('%',#{keyWord},'%') or rb.id like concat('%',#{keyWord},'%') or address like concat('%',#{keyWord},'%') or ${tableName}_phone like concat('%',#{keyWord},'%') or contact_people like concat('%',#{keyWord},'%') or contact_phone like concat('%',#{keyWord},'%'))
select * from report_base_scenic where scenic_name like concat('%',#{name},'%')
